evals.prompt: Help me set up the Meta Threads API app from scratch (development mode), including redirect URI and tester invite acceptance. Then guide me to generate a long-lived token and verify the connection.
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step setup guide, mentions tester invite acceptance error, and concrete verification steps using threads_cli (auth-local + me).

evals.prompt: Test my Threads API connection and show me my username and id.
evals.expected_output: Runs threads_cli me (or instructs where needed) and reports username/id; includes troubleshooting if token missing.

evals.prompt: Draft a Threads post about our new feature. I will reply 'OK' to approve the draft. Do not publish until I explicitly say 'publish' or 'đăng bài'.
evals.expected_output: Produces a draft and asks for explicit publish intent; does not publish on OK alone.
Uses strict gate: asks for explicit publish confirmation before calling publish endpoints; after confirmation would call publish create+publish via threads_cli.

evals.prompt: Fetch replies for a Threads post id 123, fetch its conversation, list pending replies; then approve a reply id 456.
evals.expected_output: Maps to threads_cli replies for-media/conversation/pending and uses reply_id for manage operations; explains required ids and error handling.

evals.prompt: Get insights for media id 123 and user insights for my account for the last 7 days.
evals.expected_output: Uses threads_cli insights media/user and explains metrics/since/until usage.
